steps.title: Separate name and appositive
steps.content: The phrase poet Emily Hiestand identifies which poet the editors chose, so the title and name should stay together without a comma. The following phrase author of The Very Rich Hours adds extra description and needs a comma before it.

steps.title: Reject misplaced commas
steps.content: Choice A incorrectly sets the name off on both sides. Choice B wrongly separates poet from the name. Choice C omits the comma needed before the extra descriptor that follows the name. The answer is D.
